rationale: Review 1 would lead to the better PR because the diff itself says the file adapts material from facebookresearch/atlas-lean while the header only asserts Lean FRO copyright and Apache-2.0 licensing, so asking to preserve or verify upstream attribution/license is material for attribution. Review 2 is right that the docstring names the source, but it dismisses the header/license attribution issue that is visible in the diff.
